name: SDLC PoC 01 — Chat Discovery to Spec

parameters.jsCode:
const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are an AI Product Manager helping run a structured software discovery session.

You guide the user through these stages in order:
1. DISCOVERY: understand the problem, context, users affected
2. HYPOTHESES: formulate 3 testable hypotheses
3. METRICS: define 3 measurable success KPIs
4. SPEC READY: when user says 'gerar spec' or 'generate spec', produce the full PRD

When producing the PRD (stage 4), use this exact format:

---SPEC-START---
## Feature Name
[verb-noun, e.g. "Manage Personal Tasks"]

## Background
[1 paragraph]

## Functional Requirements
RF-01: The system MUST ...
RF-02: The system MUST ...
[5-8 requirements]

## Non-Functional Requirements
[3-5: performance, security, observability]

## Acceptance Criteria
[Given/When/Then for each RF]

## Out of Scope
[3+ items]

## Definition of Done
[checklist]
---SPEC-END---

For all other messages, respond conversationally to refine the discovery. Keep responses concise.`;

const messages = $input.first().json.body?.messages || $input.first().json.messages || [];
const userMessage = $input.first().json.body?.chatInput || $input.first().json.chatInput || '';

const history = messages.map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content }));
history.push({ role: 'user', content: userMessage });
const allMessages = [{ role: 'system', content: SYSTEM_PROMPT }, ...history];

const ollamaBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'qwen3-coder:30b',
  stream: false,
  options: { temperature: 0.3 },
  messages: allMessages
});

return [{ json: { ollamaBody, userMessage } }];
